summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt football prediction platform clone. All core functionality working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI, and end-to-end user flows.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthenticated requests
minor_issues.impact: Minor - admin endpoint is properly protected, just different status code

minor_issues.issue: Response uses 'users' field instead of expected 'leaderboard' field
minor_issues.impact: Minor - data is present but field name differs from expectation

design_issues.issue: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of GuessIt branding

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint returns healthy status
System metrics endpoint working with Redis connection active
Auth /me endpoint working with session cookies
Football matches endpoint returning correct structure
Weekly status endpoint working with all expected fields
Error handling for invalid login credentials (401)
Frontend homepage loads with header, navigation, hero banner
End-to-end user registration and login flow working
Match tabs and league filters rendering correctly
Redis connection working via system metrics
